title: RFTools Base
description: RFTools Base: base mod for all McJty tech mods
body:
# RFTools Base

RFTools Base is the base mod for all tech mods by McJty. This includes [RFTools Dimensions](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/rftools-dimensions), [RFTools Control](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/rftools-control), [RFTools Power](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/rftools-power), [Deep Resonance](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/deep-resonance), [XNet](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/xnet), and so on.

## Features
It has the following features:

- Dimensional Shard oregen, small amount in the overworld, more in other dimensions
- The machine infuser
- Base crafting materials for the other tech mods
- The smart wrench
- Security and owner system

## Dependencies
**RFTools Base depends on McJtyLib.**

## Modpacks
Feel free to use RFTools Base in your modpacks.
